prompt:
A loose bundle of guppy grass held above a clear bowl of dechlorinated water, with droplets falling back into the bowl as if it was just swished to dislodge algae, snails, and eggs. A fine mesh strainer and a small aquarium plant tweezer tool sit nearby, making the “rinsed before placing” step visually unambiguous.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image in a grounded near-future solarpunk aquarium-care workspace: soft cinematic lighting, clean glass reflections, no logos, no readable labels, and no on-image text. Keep the guppy grass bundle centered and clearly identifiable as the focal item.
